tool_design.role_in_intervention: Visible closure-loop tracker proving suggestions and concerns were heard and answered.
tool_design.usage_moment: When suggestions or concerns are submitted and reviewed
tool_design.expected_output: Suggestion log with owner, response date, and outcome status

failure_warnings.warning: Entries are logged late or inconsistently.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: Patterns and closure loops stay hidden.
early_signals: Cases are discussed verbally but not logged
prevention: Tie updates to a fixed review cadence

failure_warnings.warning: Tracker is updated but no action follows.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The same communication issue repeats despite being visible.

content:
# Suggestions & Response Tracker **Tool ID:** T076-07 **Block:** B076 (Communication Culture & Feedback) **Domain:** Team & Talent (D04_team_talent) **Level:** L2 **Format:** Tracker **Role:** Manager / Owner **Time Required:** 2 minutes per entry, 10 minutes weekly review **Version:** 1.0 --- ## What This Tool Is For If the team raises concerns or ideas and management does not respond, trust collapses fast. This tracker creates a visible loop: - something was raised - someone owns the response - a date exists - the team can see whether it was acted on, parked, or declined with a reason Use it for: - suggestion box items - anonymous feedback - recurring staff comments - improvements raised in meetings or 1:1s --- ## Weekly Review Rules
  • Review all new entries once per week.
  • Respond to every item, even if the answer is no.
  • Give a reason when something is not being actioned.
  • Close the loop publicly where appropriate.
--- ## Tracker | Entry ID | Date Raised | Source | Summary | Owner | Response Due | Status | What Happened | |---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---| | | | Suggestion box / 1:1 / meeting / other | | | | New / Reviewed / In progress / Closed / Declined | | | | | Suggestion box / 1:1 / meeting / other | | | | New / Reviewed / In progress / Closed / Declined | | | | | Suggestion box / 1:1 / meeting / other | | | | New / Reviewed / In progress / Closed / Declined | | | | | Suggestion box / 1:1 / meeting / other | | | | New / Reviewed / In progress / Closed / Declined | | --- ## Response Template **Entry ID:** ____________________ **What was raised?** ________________________________________ **Decision:** [ ] action now [ ] trial first [ ] park for later [ ] decline **Reason / response:** ________________________________________ ________________________________________ **Who will communicate the outcome?** ____________________ **By when?** ____________________ --- ## What Good Looks Like | Status | Meaning | |---|---| | New | Logged but not yet reviewed | | Reviewed | Read and acknowledged | | In progress | Action agreed and moving | | Closed | Completed and communicated | | Declined | Not proceeding, but reason given | --- ## Common Mistakes - Logging suggestions but never responding. - Leaving items "open" forever. - Treating anonymous input as less valid. - Saying no without explanation. - Failing to tell the team when a good idea led to change. --- ## Connected Resources **Used alongside:** - T076-02 - Communication Charter Workshop Template - T076-05 - Communication Culture Survey & Scorecard - T076-06 - Monthly 1:1 Conversation Template **Parent block:** B076 - Communication Culture & Feedback --- *Tool Version 1.0 - built to prove that speaking up leads somewhere.*
